full_text:
Shi Ren (Junyi) 士仁 (君義)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Ren (士仁), styledJunyi (君義). Persuaded by Lü Meng to betray Guan Yu. Killed by Guan Xing after trying to return to Shu. Shi Ren was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wu Kingdom.
